description_long: This is a single-story modern house set within a rectangular fenced lot, featuring a flat roof and a clean, minimalist design. The house is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, with a paved driveway leading to a garage on one side and a swimming pool with outdoor seating on the other. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the interior living spaces to the backyard and pool area. The property is bordered by a wooden privacy fence and includes a few mature trees for shade and landscaping. The main entrance is accessible from the driveway, with a small covered porch area. The overall layout emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and functional modern aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by a wooden fence. The design features open lawns, paved driveways, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the front, highlighting the driveway, main entrance, and a large tree near the front lawn.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the side of the house with the garage, driveway extension, and a clear view of the pool and backyard area.
description_view_2: View 2 focuses on the backyard, showcasing the pool, outdoor seating, and the rear facade with large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the rear lawn, pool, and the back of the house with its open, modern design.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small covered porch, accessible from the driveway, and minimal decorative elements.
